fields.name: match
fields.description: Find match details by the match id. id is a required input field.

args.name: id
args.description: The id of the Dota match to include in this query, excluding all results that do not include this id.

fields.name: matches
fields.description: Find match details for each match id. ids is a required input field.

args.name: ids
args.description: An array of Dota match ids to include in this query.

fields.name: player
fields.description: Find player details by steam account id. id is a required input field.

args.name: steamAccountId
args.description: The steam account id to include in this query, excluding all results that do not have this steam account id.

fields.name: players
fields.description: Find player details for each steam account id. ids is a required input field.

args.name: steamAccountIds
args.description: An array of steam account ids to limit the query to only return matches with these steam account ids.

fields.name: team
fields.description: Find player details for each steam account id. ids is a required input field.

args.name: teamId
args.description: A team id to include in this query, excluding all results that do not have this team id.

fields.name: teams
fields.description: Results in a list of team objects that contain data about them and their players.

args.name: teamIds
args.description: A team id to include in this query, excluding all results that do not have this team id.

fields.name: league
fields.description: Find league details by league Id. Id is a required field.

args.name: id
args.description: A league id to include in this query, excluding all results that do not have this league id.

fields.name: leagues
fields.description: Find league details by searching for leagues using a LeagueRequest.

fields.name: guild
fields.description: For getting access to one specific Guild which was used at the start of TI10 Compendium.

args.name: id
args.description: A guild id to include in this query, excluding all results that do not have this guild id.

fields.name: yogurt
fields.description: Queries used for Stratz Yogurt - users won't be able to access these calls until they have access to the app.

fields.name: plus
fields.description: Queries used to populate Stratz Plus.

fields.name: stratz
fields.description: Stratz specific queries.

fields.name: heroStats
fields.description: Queries used to gain insights into hero data and statistics.

fields.name: constants
fields.description: Queries used to query constants in Dota.

fields.name: leaderboard
fields.description: Queries used to get leaderboard information.

fields.name: live
fields.description: Queries used to find live match data.

fields.name: vendor
fields.description: Queries used by 3rd party applications.

fields.name: radiantNetworthLeads
fields.description: This begins at -60 to 0 seconds (Index 0).

fields.name: radiantExperienceLeads
fields.description: This begins at -60 to 0 seconds (Index 0).

fields.name: radiantKills
fields.description: This begins at -60 to 0 seconds (Index 0).

fields.name: direKills
fields.description: This begins at -60 to 0 seconds (Index 0).

fields.name: pickBans
fields.description: This begins at -60 to 0 seconds (Index 0).

fields.name: neutral0Id
fields.description: The item id of the dedicated neutral item slot (7.24 and after). From game versions 7.23 to 7.24, this was the BackPack3Id (the 4th backpack slot item id).

fields.name: heroAverage
fields.description: Detailed output of data per minute for each hero.

fields.name: dotaPlus
fields.description: Gets the players of Dota which have DotaPlus and have a high level hero.
